text.message: im trynna get #1 in the state

but go to school in missouri

whenever i play in person it is with friends and they always get smoked
I mean live isn’t much different than online. Just gotta talk more lol

hard when ppl online dont wanna talk

i didnt want this between us

make that clear and i dont rob you
